summary: Excellent show praised for its vibe and seamless sequence, but recording details are unspecified
review: The reviewer rates the concert as an excellent performance, highlighting the good vibe and preferring the Dead's uninterrupted sequences, though they note a disappointment with the saxophone guest. No comments were made about the audio source or sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: High praise for the musical performance (70% weight) combined with no negative recording feedback, but only a single review limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer appreciated the natural flow of the set and felt the Dead sounded best when played without interruptions.
